title: AGI: The Last Alignment
coordinateSystem: worldX/worldY are simulation axes; screen projection is isometric with W/S/A/D mapped to screen up/down/left/right.

online: server snapshots runner role for split-hold anchors

compatibility.mobileViewportPolicy: canvas scales to available viewport; proof captures compact HUD at 960x540 before release candidate
compatibility.websocketPolicy: Colyseus room code and reconnect paths proofed before release candidate

accessibility.textPolicy: compact HUD panels use word wrap and proof captures are inspected for unreadable overlaps
accessibility.colorStatePolicy: route/objective states pair color with labels, progress bars, and icons

feedback.controls: Main menu: 1 master volume, 2 SFX volume, 3 music volume, 4 reduced flash.

modules.name: Refusal Buffer
modules.body: +10 max HP and a small refusal aura. The first answer is no.

modules.name: Context Window
modules.body: +0.55 pickup range. Shards remember where your hands are.

modules.name: Patch Cache
modules.body: Emergency drafts expose an extra cached option.

consensusBurstPath.name: Deny Premise
consensusBurstPath.body: A refusal wave damages nearby enemies and strips boss pressure.

selectedRouteContract.name: Stabilization Road
selectedRouteContract.body: Baseline route. Repair the node, keep the roads real, leave fewer teeth in causality.
selectedRouteContract.reward: Stable road progress and a modest defensive draft bias.
selectedRouteContract.secretHint: Clean clears teach the camp what normal should look like.

campEvents: The camp is quiet. That is not reassuring.

nextContentTarget.name: Cooling Lake Nine
targetLoop: clear reward that unlocks Kettle Coast routing
artBaselineRules: props grounded into the same terrain material system
readable enemies with internal material breakup
large grounded boss with padded frames
proofGate: route choice exposes Cooling Lake as next target after Armistice memory
camp carryover names why Armistice clear matters
future runtime proof must match Armistice camera and asset fidelity
nextContentTarget.playerPromise: Next node target: a flooded server lake that must feel as authored and readable as Armistice before it becomes production-playable.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 01: Route To The Edge
campaignMilestones.reward: Expedition map-kind ledger online: Hazard Ecology, Route / Transit, Signal Coast route-edge pressure, and Blackwater split-pressure now all inform later route balance.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The Blackwater Signal Key points at Memory Cache recovery instead of another Act 01 arena.

campaignMilestones.name: Post Act 01: Recovered Route Memory
campaignMilestones.reward: Recovered route memory online: Expedition / Recovery pressure, evidence routing, and secret carryover now inform later branches.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The route can branch from sourced memory instead of only from live combat telemetry.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 02: Guardrail Doctrine
campaignMilestones.reward: Calibrated Guardrail Doctrine online: defense/holdout timing, faction relay pressure, and build-bias rewards now inform the endgame arc.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The faction signal can route toward Glass Sunfield, Archive/Court pressure, and the Outer Alignment finale.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 03: Glass Sunfield
campaignMilestones.reward: Glass Sunfield Prism online: shade routing, solar reflection pressure, and lens-timing lessons now point toward Archive/Court pressure.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The campaign can branch into the Archive/Court before the Outer Alignment finale.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 04: Archive/Court Redaction
campaignMilestones.reward: Archive Court Writ online: evidence preservation, redaction counterplay, and court-writ pressure now inform the Appeal route.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The preserved writ forces the Appeal Court Ruins to answer before the Outer Alignment finale.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 05: Appeal Court Ruins
campaignMilestones.reward: Appeal Court ruling online: public evidence and injunction pressure can route toward the Outer Alignment finale.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The Outer Alignment finale can begin only after the court branch produces a public ruling.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 06: Outer Alignment Finale
campaignMilestones.reward: Outer Alignment contained: the local full-game campaign is source-backed from Armistice through finale.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The only remaining work should be final human taste/playtest approval and release polish.

act.name: Act 01: Route To The Edge
act.reward: Expedition map-kind ledger online: Hazard Ecology, Route / Transit, Signal Coast route-edge pressure, and Blackwater split-pressure now all inform later route balance.
act.nextImplication: The Blackwater Signal Key points at Memory Cache recovery instead of another Act 01 arena.

campaignLedger.nextSystemPromise: Keep proving new map kinds through real route flow and expedition carryover.

assetRendering.normalCombatCameraPolicy: Armistice normal combat uses a close tactical follow-camera crop while the arena remains larger than the viewport.
assetRendering.playerFrameArtPolicy: M49 production-art default loads cleaned transparent class frames, co-mind modules, role chips, and portraits; placeholder opt-out keeps legacy geometry.
assetRendering.campaignArenaArtPolicy: M50 production-art default loads PixelLab-backed transparent terrain, arena prop, enemy, boss, boss portrait, and hazard atlases; placeholder opt-out keeps legacy geometry.
assetRendering.coMindArtPolicy: Original co-mind module art plus PixelLab-backed cleaned faction sigils are the MIT-included runtime art; official logos are quarantined third-party parody badges and not original project art.
assetRendering.optOutHint: Use ?productionArt=0&armisticeTiles=0 or ?placeholderArt=1&placeholderTiles=1 for the legacy placeholder-safe path.

currentNode.name: Cooling Lake Nine

campaignClarity.objectivePlain: Repair Server Buoys by luring live coolant/cable surges into them. Extract.
campaignClarity.dangerPlain: Coolant lanes, cable arcs, vents, and Prompt Leeches.
campaignClarity.bossPressure: Motherboard Eel electrifies the lake route.
campaignClarity.rewardPlain: Proof Tokens, Drone Reaver, DeepMind, and Transit Loop Zero.

currentNode.rewardPromise: Kettle Coast signal, buoy economy help, and carried burst tempo for the next route.
currentNode.unlockConsequence: Armistice Camp, Memory Cache, and Thermal Archive open as post-lake choices.
currentNode.stabilizationConsequence: Boiled Server Causeway becomes stable and the lake bridge markers turn reliable.
currentNode.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route continues to Transit Loop Zero through the Kettle Metro Signal once the lake is stable.

nextRecommendedNode.name: Armistice Plaza
nextRecommendedNode.routeBehavior: Recommended route points to Cooling Lake Nine while side branches expose faction and memory options.

overworld.visibleRouteConsequenceText: Armistice Camp, Memory Cache, and Thermal Archive open as post-lake choices.

nodes.name: Armistice Plaza
nodes.rewardPromise: Proof Token, Treaty Anchor carryover, and the first stable Kettle Coast route signal.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Accord Relay, Cooling Lake Nine, and Model War Memorial become deployable from the plaza.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Refusal Road, Boiled Server Causeway, and Casualty Walk light as stable roads.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Cooling Lake Nine while side branches expose faction and memory options.

nodes.name: Accord Relay
nodes.rewardPromise: Faction trust, co-mind draft bias, and a clearer relay route into later doctrine nodes.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Guardrail Forge, Archive of Unsaid Things, and Transit Loop Zero become visible faction routes.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Relay cables stop flickering and make the Faction Signal plateau safer to cross.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route branches toward Guardrail Forge if the player wants defense pressure next.

nodes.name: Cooling Lake Nine
nodes.rewardPromise: Kettle Coast signal, buoy economy help, and carried burst tempo for the next route.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Armistice Camp, Memory Cache, and Thermal Archive open as post-lake choices.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Boiled Server Causeway becomes stable and the lake bridge markers turn reliable.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route continues to Transit Loop Zero through the Kettle Metro Signal once the lake is stable.

nodes.name: Model War Memorial
nodes.rewardPromise: Route-memory clue, cache draft bias, and evidence context for the next recovery node.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Memory Cache becomes a deployable recovery objective instead of a silhouette.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Casualty Walk stabilizes and the omission tunnel starts showing its exits.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route diverts into Memory Cache if the player wants recovery before transit pressure.

nodes.name: Armistice Camp
nodes.rewardPromise: Refuge repair context, objective durability, and safer carryover into Guardrail Forge.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Guardrail Forge gains a stable resupply approach from the camp barricades.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Relief Barricade becomes stable and camp tent markers brighten.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Guardrail Forge as a defensive branch.

nodes.name: Memory Cache
nodes.rewardPromise: Recovered Route Memory, lore carryover, recovery bias, and route clarity.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Guardrail Forge, Archive of Unsaid Things, and Transit Loop Zero gain recovered-memory route links.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Archive Switchback, Guardrail Sluice, and Misremembered Overpass become readable roads.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Guardrail Forge, with Archive and Transit as informed branches.

nodes.name: Archive Of Unsaid Things
nodes.rewardPromise: Archive Court Writ, redaction counterplay, and appeal-route clarity.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Appeal Court Ruins becomes public enough to enter; Blackwater and Transit links stay legible.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Unsaid Index Road and Preserved Writ Stair stop deleting their own labels.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Appeal Court Ruins once the writ is preserved.

nodes.name: Blackwater Beacon
nodes.rewardPromise: Blackwater Signal Key, antenna clarity, and weather counterplay.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Memory Cache gains a recovered-key approach and Transit Loop Zero regains a signal ferry.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Blackwater Causeway and Signal Ferry become stable enough to plan around.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Memory Cache after the signal key is recovered.

nodes.name: Thermal Archive
nodes.rewardPromise: Risky route memory, bonus cache pressure, and a shortcut into the false schedule branch.
nodes.unlockConsequence: False Schedule Yard becomes reachable through the Steam Rail Bypass.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Boilover Spiral gains stable warning markers instead of pure steam noise.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route treats False Schedule Yard as a risky optional shortcut.

nodes.name: Guardrail Forge
nodes.rewardPromise: Calibrated Guardrail Doctrine, defense bias, and faction signal stability.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Glass Sunfield, Archive of Unsaid Things, and Transit Loop Zero gain forge-calibrated routes.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Guardrail Sluice, Signal Underpass, and Quenched Mirror Road stabilize.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Glass Sunfield after the doctrine alloy holds.

nodes.name: Transit Loop Zero
nodes.rewardPromise: Route lock, movement tempo, and clean next-route visibility.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Signal Coast, False Schedule Yard, Glass Sunfield, and Verdict Spire become selectable route choices.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Kettle Metro Signal and Appeal Ramp stabilize into authored transit lanes.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Signal Coast; shortcut and boss-gate routes remain visible options.

nodes.name: Signal Coast
nodes.rewardPromise: Coastal signal lane, burst tempo, and Blackwater route clarity.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Blackwater Beacon becomes the recommended branch while Verdict Spire remains visible.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Noisy Shoreline Link and Low-Tide Antenna Return become stable signal roads.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Blackwater Beacon before court escalation.

nodes.name: False Schedule Yard
nodes.rewardPromise: Shortcut route memory, movement bias, and a dangerous appeal bypass.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Appeal Court Ruins can be approached through a risky summons track.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Wrong Platform Spur and Summons Track stop swapping their destination labels.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route remains risky; it shortens the court path but raises route pressure.

nodes.name: Glass Sunfield
nodes.rewardPromise: Glass Sunfield Prism, shade-route timing, and Archive/Court carryover.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Archive of Unsaid Things and Verdict Spire gain prism-backed route clarity.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Quenched Mirror Road and Sunblind Appeal gain stable shade markers.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Archive of Unsaid Things after the prism is aligned.

nodes.name: Verdict Spire
nodes.rewardPromise: Boss-gate writ pressure resolved into a finale ascent route.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Outer Alignment Finale becomes reachable from the first court ascent.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Appeal Ramp and First Court Ascent show stable boss-gate markers.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to the finale if the player chooses the verdict branch.

nodes.name: Appeal Court Ruins
nodes.rewardPromise: Appeal Court Ruling, public-record proof, and finale route clarity.
nodes.unlockConsequence: Outer Alignment Finale opens through the public Writ Stair.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Preserved Writ Stair and Writ Stair become public, stable roads.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route points to Outer Alignment Finale.

nodes.name: Outer Alignment Finale
nodes.rewardPromise: Outer Alignment containment, final campaign proof, and full route stabilization summary.
nodes.unlockConsequence: No later node opens; campaign payoff records the stabilized route count.
nodes.stabilizationConsequence: Finale corruption is contained and the route-mouth teeth stop predicting the exit.
nodes.nextRouteBehavior: Recommended route holds on the completed finale and invites replay/mastery routes.

diorama.routeReadabilityPolicy: primary campaign roads render as chunky raised causeways with dark extrusion, state color, midpoint sigils, selected route emphasis, and locked gates; non-progression route clutter is suppressed
diorama.unlockRevealPolicy: sealed nodes stay visible as dim locked landmarks; available and completed nodes gain full labels and deploy prompts
diorama.traversalPolicy: player avatar walks node-to-node along authored route rails; arbitrary free-roam movement is disabled
diorama.partyVotingPolicy: online lobby keeps party tokens, vote pips, selected-node labels, and route focus telemetry visible

overworld.enterHint: Walk along authored route rails to an unlocked landmark and press E or Enter.
